---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new feature
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Description

Clear and concise description of the feature.

## Problem

What problem does this solve? Is this related to a current limitation?

## Proposed Solution

How would you implement this feature? Any design ideas?

## Alternative Solutions

Are there other ways to solve this problem?

## Additional Context

Any other information, mockups, or examples that might be helpful.

## Priority

- [ ] Low — Nice to have
- [ ] Medium — Useful improvement
- [ ] High — Important for users
